title: Aquifers Be Gone
description: Makes Carver-Based Caves Always Have Air
body:
# This mod does not affect all aquifers

This mod specifically effects aquifers made out of carver-based caves. These are the caves that were around before the Caves & Cliffs Update.

This mod simply replaces cave-carver code with code that does not fill the caves with water.

## Comparison
![Comarison between ABG and Vanilla](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/3DxDmIN5/images/0e199436ce0ed2c6ad7a8706820eb9bac8b811d7.png)
